name: CMP_MKT_VND_JOB_FAMILY_VL
query: SELECT B.JOB_FAMILY_ID, B.JOB_FAMILY_SEQ_NUM, B.JOB_FAMILY_CODE, T.JOB_FAMILY_NAME, T.JOB_FAMILY_DESCR, T.DESCRIPTION, B.VENDOR_ID, B.STATUS, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM CMP_MKT_VND_JOB_FAMILY_B B, CMP_MKT_VND_JOB_FAMILY_TL T where B.JOB_FAMILY_ID = T.JOB_FAMILY_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = T.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
